sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Don’t Buy the Railroads. Buy the Campbell’s.
feed.summary: This article argues that in technological booms, the "appliers" who utilize new infrastructure often outperform the "builders" who create it. Using historical examples like railroads and the internet, the author suggests that the same dynamic is playing out with artificial intelligence. Investors should focus on companies that apply AI to boost efficiency rather than those investing heavily in building AI infrastructure, with PayPal Holdings Inc. highlighted as a prime example of an "AI Applier."

feed.title: CrowdStrike vs. Palo Alto Networks: Which Cybersecurity Leader Deserves a Premium Valuation?
feed.summary: This article analyzes the valuation of two leading cybersecurity companies, CrowdStrike (CRWD) and Palo Alto Networks (PANW), to determine which deserves its premium. While CrowdStrike trades at a significantly higher P/E multiple despite similar forward growth estimates, Palo Alto boasts stronger free cash flow generation and a larger revenue base. The article concludes that CrowdStrike suits growth-oriented investors comfortable with valuation risk, while Palo Alto appeals to those prioritizing durable free cash flow and a relatively lower multiple.

feed.title: Stock Traders Buy High Volume of Call Options on Vodafone Group (NASDAQ:VOD)
feed.summary: Stock investors recently purchased an unusually high volume of call options on Vodafone Group (NASDAQ:VOD), representing a 102% increase over the average daily call volume. Several institutional investors also boosted their stakes in Vodafone during the first quarter. Despite multiple analyst upgrades, the stock currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $72.00.

feed.title: Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion (NYSE:VLRS) Given New $9.00 Price Target at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion (NYSE:VLRS) to $9.00 from $10.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment follows a significant earnings miss where the company reported an EPS of ($0.62) against an estimated ($0.04). Analyst coverage for VLRS is currently mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $9.04.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 6.62% stake in Raymond James | RJF SEC Filing - Form SCHEDULE 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a significant passive investment in Raymond James Financial Inc. (RJF) through a Schedule 13G filing. The investment firm reported beneficial ownership of 13,062,357 shares of Common Stock, which constitutes 6.62% of the class. This filing indicates Vanguard's sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 1,703,664 shares, executed on behalf of clients across its various affiliates and business divisions.

feed.title: Vor Biopharma Inc. (NASDAQ:VOR) Short Interest Down 17.3% in April
feed.summary: Vor Biopharma Inc. (NASDAQ:VOR) experienced a 17.3% decrease in short interest in April, with the total short interest reaching 4,706,707 shares as of April 15th. This represents 9.7% of the company's float, with a days-to-cover ratio of 3.5 days. The stock was trading up 5.6% at midday, reaching $14.81, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $50.56.

feed.title: Lowe’s Launches MyLowe’s Pro Rewards American Express Card
feed.summary: Lowe's has launched the MyLowe’s Pro Rewards American Express Card, expanding its co-brand partnership with Synchrony. This new card allows pro customers to earn rewards on eligible purchases anywhere American Express is accepted, complementing the existing in-store-only MyLowe’s Pro Rewards Credit Card. The initiative aims to provide flexible financing and a seamless experience for small-to-medium pros, enhancing their ability to manage projects.

feed.title: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) Given Sector Perform Rating at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank Of Canada reissued its "sector perform" rating for American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a $195.00 target price. Other analysts have a more bullish outlook, with a consensus target price of $218.05 and an average "Moderate Buy" rating. The stock has seen recent insider selling by COO Eugene M. Noel and buying by Director Rajesh Kalathur, while institutional investors have adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: What's Going On With Altria Group Stock On Thursday?
feed.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) stock is trading higher on Thursday after the company reported strong first-quarter adjusted earnings per share of $1.32, beating analyst estimates. Sales also outpaced expectations, driven by higher pricing in its smokeable products segment and strong performance from its "on!" oral tobacco product. The company affirmed its 2026 adjusted EPS guidance, noting that strong Q1 results should lead to more balanced growth throughout the year despite slower e-vapor industry growth and macroeconomic pressures.

feed.title: Wildfires weigh on PG&E as California sees modest large load demand
feed.summary: PG&E CEO Patti Poppe indicated that the utility's $73 billion five-year capital plan could be revised if California legislators fail to pass suitable wildfire reforms by the end of August. The utility is seeking a holistic package of reforms, including changes to state building codes, to ensure stability for investors. Despite expecting only modest large load growth from data centers compared to other regions, PG&E is actively working to attract data center developers and has 4.6 GW of data centers in final engineering.

feed.title: Vanguard files Schedule 13G: Solventum Corp (SOLV) 10.88M shares disclosed
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing beneficial ownership of 10,875,310 shares of Solventum Corp (SOLV), which represents 6.27% of the class. This filing indicates that Vanguard holds sole voting power for 1,273,361 shares and sole dispositive power for all 10,875,310 shares. The disclosed holdings are primarily for Vanguard funds and managed accounts, with the document signed on April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Workday (WDAY), CoreWeave (CRWV) and Figma, Inc. Class A (FIG)
feed.summary: Analysts from Rosenblatt Securities, Wells Fargo, and Morgan Stanley have provided ratings and price targets for Workday (WDAY), CoreWeave (CRWV), and Figma, Inc. Class A (FIG). Workday received a "Buy" rating with a target of $183.75, CoreWeave also got a "Buy" rating with a $135.00 target, and Figma, Inc. Class A was maintained at "Hold" with a target of $44.00, implying a significant upside from its current market price. This report summarizes the analyst consensus and individual ratings for these technology companies.

feed.title: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) Sees Significant Decrease in Short Interest
feed.summary: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) experienced a 21.2% decrease in short interest in April, totaling 6,592,312 shares, representing approximately 2.1% of the stock. While institutional investors have been increasing their stakes, company insiders were net sellers, disposing of shares worth about $5.52 million in the past 90 days. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To L3Harris (LHX) Earnings Beat And Dividend Affirmation
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with increased sales and net income, alongside affirming its quarterly cash dividend of US$1.25 per share. This reinforces its investment narrative as a defense and space contractor committed to capital returns, though concerns about U.S. government budget constraints, particularly in space programs, remain a central risk. The company's forecasts project significant revenue and earnings growth by 2029, suggesting a fair value of US$392.16 with a 22% upside.

feed.title: Wah Fu Education (WAFU) CFO Ai Shuting files initial Form 3
feed.summary: Wah Fu Education Group Ltd.'s CFO, Ai Shuting, has filed an initial Form 3, establishing her as a reporting insider for the company. This filing indicates her beneficial ownership without detailing any specific stock transactions, serving primarily to set her reporting status under SEC regulations. The document confirms her role as CFO and the neutral sentiment of the filing.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 12.85M shares in Regency Centers Corp (NYSE: REG)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported beneficial ownership of 12,845,240 shares, representing 7.01% of Regency Centers Corp (NYSE: REG) common stock, according to a recent Schedule 13G SEC filing. This includes sole dispositive power over all 12.85 million shares and sole voting power over 1,554,511 shares. The filing indicates a passive investment stance for Vanguard, with the ownership position dated March 31, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 47.5M ONEOK shares as 7.54% owner (OKE)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 47,489,926 shares of ONEOK (OKE) common stock, representing 7.54% of the class. The Schedule 13G filing indicates that Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares but sole voting power over a smaller portion, 6,622,394 shares, which is typical for asset managers holding passive investments. The filing was signed by Ashley Grim on April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Big Tech Is on an AI Spending Spree. Quanta Services Sees Fatter Profit Ahead.
feed.summary: Quanta Services, an AI infrastructure builder, saw its shares rise to a record high on Thursday after exceeding first-quarter earnings estimates. The company also increased its full-year outlook, signaling anticipated fatter profits. This performance comes as Big Tech companies are heavily investing in AI infrastructure.

feed.title: 1 No-Brainer Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock to Buy With $190, According to Wall Street
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ: PANW) is highlighted as a compelling artificial intelligence (AI) stock, with Wall Street analysts largely recommending it as a buy. The company is innovating rapidly in cybersecurity to combat AI-powered cyberattacks, launching new products like Cortex XSIAM and Prisma AIRS 3.0. Palo Alto's strong revenue growth, particularly in its next-generation security portfolio, and its undervalued stock compared to rivals like CrowdStrike make it an attractive investment opportunity in the AI revolution.

feed.title: Viasat Completes ViaSat-3 Constellation with Successful Flight 3 Launch
feed.summary: Viasat has successfully launched its ViaSat-3 Flight 3 (F3) satellite, completing its next-generation global constellation. The F3 satellite, designed for the Asia-Pacific region, will provide high-speed connectivity with advanced dynamic beam-forming technology. This launch also coincides with a leadership reorganization and signifies a strategic shift towards reducing capital intensity and improving financial outlook for Viasat.

feed.title: AMETEK, Inc. has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire First Aviation Services Inc.
feed.summary: AMETEK, Inc. announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire First Aviation Services Inc. The transaction was revealed on April 30, 2026, and is pending customary closing conditions and regulatory approvals. This acquisition follows a period where AMETEK's stock showed a 2.71% increase.

feed.title: JA and Delta launch Clayton County “Discovery Center” to help next gen careers take flight
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines, The Delta Air Lines Foundation, Junior Achievement (JA) of Georgia, and Clayton County Public Schools have opened the JA Delta Discovery Center of Clayton County. This new facility, which includes the Delta Dream Accelerator, will annually serve 12,000-14,000 students, offering hands-on experiences to develop workforce readiness and explore career paths. The center signifies Delta's significant investment in the community and its enduring partnership with Junior Achievement, aiming to equip students with crucial skills for future success.

feed.title: American Express® Gold Card Changes: Bigger Spend, Better Perks & Rewards
feed.summary: The American Express Gold Card has new updates, including a higher spending requirement of $8,000 in six months to earn up to 100,000 points. While this makes the welcome offer harder to achieve for some, Amex has also added new benefits like Hertz Five Star rental car elite status, updated dining credit options, and increased point-earning on certain travel bookings through Amex Travel. The annual fee remains unchanged, making these modifications a net positive for many cardholders.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Reports Long-Term Data on Myasthenia Drug
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson reported new Phase 3 data for its myasthenia gravis drug, IMAAVY, showing sustained symptom improvement and reduced antibody levels in patients over 120 weeks. The Vivacity-MG3 study and its extension revealed significant reductions in disease severity scores and immunoglobulin G levels, along with decreased corticosteroid use. These results reinforce IMAAVY's efficacy and safety profile, supporting its long-term use for managing generalized myasthenia gravis.

feed.title: Textron Aviation Revenues Jump 22% in Q1, Parent Plans Industrial Spinoff
feed.summary: Textron Aviation saw a 22% increase in revenues during the first quarter, driven by higher deliveries, particularly of the Longitude jet. Parent company Textron Inc. plans to spin off its Industrial segment to focus solely on aerospace and defense. This strategic move aims to create a pure-play A&D company.

feed.title: [144] USCB FINANCIAL HOLDINGS, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. on April 30, 2026, for the proposed sale of 50,000 shares of Class A Voting Common Stock with an aggregate market value of $925,000. The filing provides information about the issuer, the securities to be sold, and the acquisition details, indicating a stock exchange transaction in 2021. The article also includes recent news and other SEC filings for USCB, along with company stock data.

feed.title: Unitil investors gave executive pay 96% support at annual vote
feed.summary: Unitil (NYSE: UTL) shareholders elected three directors and ratified independent accountants at their Annual Meeting on April 29, 2026. Significantly, the advisory "say-on-pay" vote for executive compensation received overwhelming support with 96% approval. Chairman & CEO Thomas P. Meissner, Jr. highlighted 2025 achievements and the company's long-term strategy, reinforcing a pattern of steady governance and regulated growth.

feed.title: UPDATE -- Akamai Is Recognized as a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for API Protection
feed.summary: Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) has been named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights “Voice of the Customer” for API Protection, achieving a 93% recommendation rate and being the sole vendor to receive this distinction. This recognition highlights Akamai's strong customer focus and its API security solutions, which are crucial for protecting organizations against growing API-based AI application risks. The report includes positive testimonials from customers across various industries, praising Akamai's product and support.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Tetra Technologies Q1 2026 beats expectations with strong performance
feed.summary: Tetra Technologies (TTI) reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with an EPS of $0.06 and revenue of $156.25 million. The company's stock rose in premarket trading, driven by robust performance in Completion Fluids and Products and strategic advancements in specialty chemicals and critical minerals. Tetra Technologies projects continued growth in key segments and is progressing with its Arkansas bromine plant and critical mineral development initiatives.

feed.title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential Reportedly Explore Potential Megamerger
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities Inc. (NYSE: AVB) and Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR), two of the largest U.S. apartment REITs, are reportedly in early-stage discussions about a potential merger. This significant transaction would combine portfolios totaling over 180,000 apartment units and reshape the multifamily sector. Both companies have market capitalizations around $25 billion and previously partnered on the $9 billion acquisition of Archstone in 2013.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 54.98M shares of PPL (NYSE: PPL) in Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing beneficial ownership of 54,981,572 shares, representing a 7.31% stake in PPL Corp (NYSE: PPL). The filing indicates Vanguard exercises sole voting power over 7,782,934 shares and sole dispositive power over all 54,981,572 shares. This passive investment is made on behalf of various Vanguard-managed vehicles, with the filing signed on April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Monolithic Power Systems (NASDAQ: MPWR) details 2026 proxy, board changes and pay
feed.summary: Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) has detailed its 2026 proxy statement, outlining key proposals for its virtual annual meeting on June 11, 2026, including the election of two Class I directors, ratification of EY as auditor, and an advisory vote on executive compensation. The company reported strong financial performance in 2025 with $2.79 billion in revenue, a 26.4% year-over-year increase, and increased its annual dividend to $6.24 per share, with a further raise planned for 2026. MPWR emphasized its performance-based executive compensation, declassified board structure, and reduced stockholder threshold for calling special meetings, all influenced by stockholder feedback.

feed.title: MGM Resorts reports Q1 growth in Las Vegas revenue
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International saw its Las Vegas Strip revenue grow year-over-year for the first time in over a year during Q1 2026, primarily driven by strong convention and group business. Despite challenges like decreased Canadian visitation and soft midweek occupancy at some properties, the company's net revenues reached $2.2 billion, with new all-inclusive-style packages showing promise in attracting first-time visitors.

feed.title: ICE reports record revenue of $3B, profit of $1.4B in Q1 2026
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) announced record Q1 2026 net revenue of $3 billion, a 20% increase year-over-year, and net income of $1.4 billion, up 77%. This performance was driven by strong trading activity and growth in its exchanges, fixed income, and mortgage technology sectors. The mortgage technology segment notably grew 6% to $539 million, achieving its strongest quarterly performance since Q4 2022 despite a slower originations market.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials Analysts Boost Their Forecasts Following Better-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials (NYSE: VMC) reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings of $1.35 per share, surpassing analyst estimates of $1.12, and sales of $1.756 billion, exceeding the $1.617 billion consensus. Following these strong results, analysts from Stephens & Co. and Barclays raised their price targets for the stock, with Vulcan Materials shares rising 1.4% to $300.20. CEO Ronnie Pruitt highlighted the company's strategic focus, innovation, and strong execution as key drivers for adjusted EBITDA growth and margin expansion.

feed.title: Sonablate Names Former Stryker Medical President Brad Saar to Board as It Expands HIFU Prostate Cancer Platform
feed.summary: Medical technology company Sonablate, focused on non-invasive prostate cancer treatment using high-intensity focused ultrasound (HIFU), has appointed Brad Saar, former president of Stryker’s Medical Division, to its Board of Directors. The appointment aims to expand the adoption of its precision ultrasound platform in urologic care and support the company's next phase of growth, including international expansion and broader integration of HIFU into clinical practice. Saar brings over 30 years of medical technology leadership experience, which Sonablate expects will help scale physician adoption of HIFU technology and meet the growing demand for non-invasive alternatives in prostate cancer treatment.

feed.title: Merck beats Q1 forecasts on strong Keytruda demand
feed.summary: Merck & Co. Inc. surpassed Q1 market forecasts and raised its full-year guidance, driven by robust sales of its cancer drug Keytruda. Despite strong revenue growth and a smaller-than-expected adjusted loss per share, the company reported a net loss due to a charge from a recent acquisition. Shares saw mixed trading but were slightly down by mid-morning on Wall Street.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Valero Energy’s Q1 2026 earnings beat forecasts but stock dips
feed.summary: Valero Energy reported strong Q1 2026 results, with EPS of $4.22 and revenue of $32.38 billion, significantly beating analyst forecasts. Despite the positive earnings and a substantial turnaround from a net loss in the previous year, the company's stock experienced a 3.7% dip in pre-market trading, possibly due to broader market concerns or geopolitical tensions. Management highlighted operational flexibility and strategic investments, while addressing challenges like the Port Arthur refinery incident and emphasizing proactive financial management and shareholder returns.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: A. O. Smith Q1 2026 misses EPS forecast, stock dips
feed.summary: A. O. Smith Corporation (AOS) reported a challenging Q1 2026, missing EPS and revenue forecasts with an EPS of $0.85 against a $0.95 estimate and revenue of $946 million versus $975.73 million expected. The company's shares dropped 2.37% in pre-market trading, reflecting investor concerns. Despite these issues, the company expects EPS growth in upcoming quarters and plans restructuring to improve profitability and achieve cost savings.

feed.title: Karpus discloses 8.4M-share position in Western Asset (NYSE: WIA)
feed.summary: Karpus Management, Inc. has filed an amended ownership report, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 8,398,525.7 common shares in Western Asset Inflation-Linked Income Fund (NYSE: WIA). This stake represents approximately 36.01% of the fund's outstanding shares as of January 28, 2026. Karpus holds sole voting and dispositive power over these shares, accumulated for client accounts with an aggregate purchase price of around $79.67 million.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin vs. RTX Corporation: Which Defense Stock Is the Smarter Investment?
feed.summary: This article compares Lockheed Martin (LMT) and RTX Corporation (RTX) as defense stock investments following their Q1 2026 earnings. While RTX showed strong organic growth and raised full-year guidance, Lockheed Martin missed estimates and faces near-term pressures. The analysis delves into their financial performance, valuation multiples, and long-term upside potential, concluding that LMT offers higher potential returns due to its cheaper starting valuation, despite its current headwinds, while RTX presents a steadier, lower-volatility compounding thesis.

feed.title: Amgen Inc Stock (AMGN) Moved Up by 3.25% on Apr 30: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Amgen Inc (AMGN) stock rose by 3.25% on April 30, despite regulatory concerns regarding its drug Tavneos, which the FDA has proposed to withdraw due to issues with effectiveness and safety. The positive movement was primarily driven by investor optimism surrounding its anticipated Q1 2026 earnings report and promising pipeline developments, including the obesity candidate MariTide. This suggests investors are weighing the regulatory risks against the company's strong development prospects and overall financial health.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Inc Stock (TXN) Moved Up by 3.03% on Apr 30: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Texas Instruments Inc (TXN) stock rose by 3.03% on April 30, driven by a strong Q1 earnings report that beat analyst expectations, impressive growth in its industrial and data center segments, and optimistic forward guidance. Positive analyst sentiment and a favorable environment in the broader semiconductor industry further bolstered investor confidence. Technical indicators show a buy signal with an overbought condition, while fundamental analysis highlights the company's strong revenue and net profit rankings.

feed.title: Assessing TransDigm Group (TDG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
feed.summary: TransDigm Group (TDG) has experienced recent share price volatility, showing a small gain over the past month but weaker performance over three months and a year, despite strong 5-year returns. The stock is considered 26% undervalued with a fair value of $1,537.14 based on strong aftermarket revenues, expanding profitability, and a premium earnings multiple. Investors are advised to review the underlying numbers and consider risks like high leverage and shifts in aircraft platforms.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NYSE: OXY) reports 54.7M shares (5.51%) stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 54,666,711 shares, representing a 5.51% stake in Occidental Petroleum Corp (NYSE: OXY) as of March 31, 2026. This stake includes 7,253,735 shares with sole voting power and 54,666,711 shares with sole dispositive power, held across Vanguard funds and managed accounts. The Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment strategy, not for the purpose of influencing company control.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 16.7M-share stake in Nucor (NYSE: NUE)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a significant stake in Nucor Corp (NYSE: NUE), holding 16,726,022 shares, which represents 7.34% of the company's common stock, as detailed in a recent Schedule 13G filing. While Vanguard possesses sole dispositive power over all these shares, its sole voting power is limited to 2,259,578 shares. This filing is classified as a routine disclosure for a passive institutional investor, with the ownership snapshot taken as of March 31, 2026.

feed.title: Intel vs. Micron: Morgan Stanley Picks the Superior AI Chip Stock to Buy
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Joseph Moore prefers Micron (MU) over Intel (INTC) despite both companies experiencing significant stock surges driven by AI demand. Moore assigns an Equal-weight (Neutral) rating to Intel due to market share concerns and valuation, while maintaining an Overweight (Buy) rating on Micron, believing the memory market has undergone a structural shift due to AI's high demand. The broader Street consensus aligns with Moore's view, with Intel rated as a Hold and Micron as a Strong Buy.

feed.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Wingstop After Q1 Results
feed.summary: Wingstop Inc. reported mixed first-quarter results, with adjusted earnings per share beating estimates but quarterly sales missing the Street's view. Despite a decline in same-store sales, the company achieved system-wide sales growth and double-digit Adjusted EBITDA growth. Following these results, several analysts, including those from Stephens & Co., BTIG, Wells Fargo, and Barclays, lowered their price targets for Wingstop, causing the stock to fall.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (PNW) holds 8.89M shares, 7.35% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.35% stake in Pinnacle West Capital Corp (PNW), beneficially owning 8,892,434 shares as of March 31, 2026. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 1,090,994 shares, held through Vanguard funds and managed accounts. This disclosure is a standard institutional filing and does not imply intent to change or influence control of the company.

feed.title: Only one vendor got Gartner users' API protection nod: Akamai
feed.summary: Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) has been recognized as a 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Customers’ Choice for API Protection, marking it as the only vendor to achieve this distinction with a 93% recommendation rate. This recognition is based on end-user feedback and highlights Akamai's strong performance in protecting APIs against growing security risks, especially with the rise of API-based AI applications. The company's Executive Vice President, Mani Sundaram, attributes this honor to Akamai's customer focus and user experience.
